name: Kansas City (Missouri, United States)

colors.symbolism: the kindness and warm-heartedness of the people of Kansas City
the central stylised fountain emblem — Kansas City as the City of Fountains

description: Two equal horizontal stripes — red over blue — with a white stylised fountain emblem in the centre.
history: Designed by Jared Horman and adopted by a 10–1 vote of the Kansas City Council on 9 February 2023, replacing earlier flags. It is the seventh city flag for Kansas City, Missouri.

features.symbolism: red above for the kindness and warm-heartedness of Kansas Citians; blue below for the Missouri River
a stylised white fountain at the centre, recalling Kansas City's reputation as the "City of Fountains"
